zh.label: 最新版本
zh.title: 应用内更新安装修复
changes: 将 Sparkle 更新框架升级到 2.9.4，修复安装器启动超时导致的更新错误
修复应用内更新可能停在 Installer never started archive extraction 后失败的问题
如果 0.5.9 的应用内更新仍报错，可下载 DMG 手动覆盖安装本版本
应用、Sparkle 更新 ZIP 和手动安装 DMG 均已签名并通过 Apple 公证

en.label: Latest
en.title: In-app update installation fix
changes: Updated Sparkle to 2.9.4 to fix an updater installer launch timeout.
Fixed a case where in-app updates could stop after Installer never started archive extraction.
If 0.5.9 still shows the old updater error, download the DMG and manually replace the app once.
The app, Sparkle update ZIP, and manual-install DMG are signed and notarized by Apple.
